companies.name: CMC Gas (Clarke-Mobile Counties Gas District)
companies.notes: Public corporation (1953) jointly owned by Jackson, Grove Hill, Thomasville serving Clarke, Washington, Choctaw, Escambia, Wilcox, Baldwin, and N. Mobile counties in SW Alabama. Primarily natural gas with propane service.

companies.name: Riviera Utilities
companies.notes: Not-for-profit municipal utility serving S. Baldwin County (Foley, Magnolia Springs, Summerdale, Elberta, Gulf Shores, Silverhill, Loxley) since 1916. Natural gas with propane adjacency.

companies.name: Dowdle Butane Gas Co., Inc.
companies.notes: Long-established independent LP-gas dealer in Covington County, SE Alabama (distinct from dedup 'dowdleco' AL entry covering related Dowdle operations — confirmed distinct by address and normalization).

companies.name: Hy Temp Gas
companies.notes: Legacy south Alabama propane brand; customer book later absorbed into ThompsonGas rollup.

companies.name: Kountry Propane
companies.notes: Former south Alabama propane brand rolled up into ThompsonGas.

companies.name: Central Propane Co
companies.notes: NE Alabama / Tennessee Valley multi-branch propane marketer (Marshall, DeKalb, Madison, Jackson counties).

companies.name: Ozark Propane Gas
companies.notes: Bottle filling plant and retail dealer in Ozark, Dale County, SE Alabama Wiregrass.

companies.name: Alliance Propane & Petroleum
companies.notes: Hunsucker family operator in Scott County, west-central Arkansas (Ouachita National Forest region).

companies.name: Matador Gas Arkansas
companies.notes: Independent Arkansas propane operator (Matador Gas AR) — distinct from standalone 'matador' normalization.

companies.name: Andersons Propane of Bergman
companies.notes: Doug Anderson family since 1988; covers 22 counties across northern Arkansas and southern Missouri (Ozarks and NE Arkansas Delta). Distinct from dedup short-form variants.

companies.name: Cypress Propane Co., Inc.
companies.notes: Acadiana independent serving Evangeline, Vermilion, Acadia, St. Landry parishes.

companies.name: Menard Oil Co., Inc.
companies.notes: Vermilion / St. Mary parish wholesale fuel distributor also serving propane to Acadiana farms and retail. Exxon/Mobil branded jobber.

companies.name: Blue Flame Gas Co of LA, LLC
companies.notes: Washington Parish Florida-parishes propane dealer.

companies.name: Guntown LP Gas
companies.notes: Lee County NE Mississippi hill-country dealer (distinct from 'guntownco' DB entry).

companies.name: Slate Spring LP Gas Company, Inc.
companies.notes: Calhoun City independent (Calhoun County NE MS hill-country) — distinct from 'slatespringco' partial-match DB entry.

companies.name: Local L.P. Gas Company
companies.notes: Wayne County SE Mississippi pine belt dealer.

companies.name: O'Dell Oil Company
companies.notes: Upstate SC / NE Georgia fuels and propane distributor covering Anderson, Pickens, Oconee, Abbeville counties.

companies.name: Southern Propane Services, Inc.
companies.notes: Orangeburg County Midlands propane service provider.

companies.name: Carolina Propane Gas Corp.
companies.notes: Propane delivery and HVAC services; Orangeburg, Calhoun, Bamberg, Aiken, Barnwell counties.

companies.name: Lower State Gas Company
companies.notes: Breland family; 58+ years serving Barnwell, Bamberg, Aiken, Orangeburg counties.

companies.name: Palmetto Propane & Fuels
companies.notes: Multi-location SC/GA propane and commercial fuels marketer (distinct from 'palmetto' / 'palmettosice' partial-match DB entries).

companies.name: Keenan Energy
companies.notes: Midlands SC multi-location propane dealer (29203/29059).

companies.name: Reid Gas Inc
companies.notes: York County NC-border independent propane dealer (29730).

companies.name: Freeman Gas Co
companies.notes: Upstate SC multi-branch (Cherokee, Spartanburg, Union counties) — distinct from 'freemanbrevardoffice' DB entry.

companies.name: Southern Gas Co
companies.notes: York County SC independent LP marketer (29745) now partially under AmeriGas brand.

companies.name: Clarendon Gas
companies.notes: Clarendon County Midlands SC propane marketer (29102); partially co-branded with AmeriGas.

companies.name: Sun Coast Energy
companies.notes: Baldwin County AL / SC coastal HVAC + propane provider.

companies.notes: Louisiana residential / commercial propane gas piping, appliance hookups and fuel delivery operator.
